channel.title: OP Box Index — One Piece Booster Box Research
channel.description: Data reports and guides on One Piece Card Game sealed booster boxes: prices, PSA grading data and market analysis.

item.title: One Piece Box Market Weekly: 2026-07-16
item.description: Week of 2026-07-16: PRB-01 led Japanese boxes at +14.2%; 17,526 new PSA grades. Auto-generated from our weekly tracking data.

item.title: OP-16 Booster Box Price, One Month After Launch — Real Tracked Data
item.description: OP-16 Japanese box: pre-orders peaked at $220, crashed to $123 after the May 30 launch, now $150. Daily-tracked price path, the three Manga Rare admirals (¥498,000 Sakazuki), grading volume ramp, and whether a box is worth it today.

item.title: PSA Grading Is Eating One Piece Sealed Supply: Weekly Population Data
item.description: Nearly 100,000 One Piece cards were PSA-graded in six weeks. We break down weekly grading volume by set, what gem rates mean for prices, and how grading destroys sealed supply.

item.title: One Piece Card Game Set List & Release Dates (2022-2026, incl. OP-17)
item.description: Every One Piece Card Game booster set in order: OP-01 through OP-17, EB and PRB, with Japanese and English release dates and current sealed box prices.

item.title: One Piece Booster Box Prices in the Philippines, Singapore, Malaysia, Indonesia & Thailand (2026)
item.description: What a One Piece booster box costs in PHP, SGD, MYR, IDR and THB, how the Asia English edition differs from the US version, and where Southeast Asian collectors actually buy.

item.title: Japanese vs English One Piece Box Prices: 6 Months of Data (July 2026)
item.description: We tracked every One Piece booster box in both languages for six months. English boxes cost 1.3x to 7.4x their Japanese versions - and the gap follows a pattern you can use.

item.title: How Many Packs in a One Piece Booster Box? Packs, Cards & MSRP Explained
item.description: A Japanese One Piece booster box has 24 packs of 6 cards; English packs hold more cards at a higher MSRP. Official numbers, box math, and why market prices differ from retail.

item.title: One Piece Card Price Guide: NM, PSA 10 and Sold Prices
item.description: A practical One Piece card price guide for Japanese raw NM cards and PSA 10 cards: how to use eBay sold prices, avoid variant mismatches and compare chase-card value.

item.title: How to Pick the Best One Piece Booster Box (Data, Not Hype)
item.description: A data-driven method for choosing the best Japanese One Piece booster box to buy: sold prices vs asking prices, chase-card support, scarcity, demand and the traps to avoid.

item.title: PSA 10 vs NM One Piece Card Prices
item.description: Why PSA 10 One Piece card prices differ from NM raw card prices, and how graded-card liquidity affects booster box research.

item.title: One Piece Booster Box Price Guide
item.description: How to read One Piece booster box prices using sold comps, active listings, chase-card strength, language version, supply risk and seller quality.

item.title: How OP Box Index Reads One Piece Market Signals
item.description: How OP Box Index interprets One Piece booster box prices, eBay active listings, sold comps, PSA 10 data and chase-card strength.

item.title: How PSA Population Data Affects One Piece Card Prices
item.description: How PSA population reports and gem rate (PSA 10 rate) drive One Piece card prices, why low population usually means higher prices, and how population can shift over time.

item.title: OP-05 vs OP-06 One Piece Booster Box: Which Is the Better Sealed Pick?
item.description: Comparing OP-05 Awakening of the New Era and OP-06 Wings of the Captain Japanese sealed booster boxes: release timing, chase cards, PSA 10 signals and how to judge which is the stronger pick today.

item.title: 7 Signals That Move One Piece Booster Box Prices
item.description: The main factors behind Japanese One Piece sealed booster box price movement: supply, reprints, chase cards, PSA demand, liquidity and marketplace risk.

item.title: Sealed Booster Box Reseal Checklist
item.description: A practical checklist for reviewing One Piece sealed booster boxes before buying: photos, wrap, edges, seller history, price and return policy.

item.title: Japanese vs English One Piece Booster Box: Which Should You Buy? (2026 Price Data)
item.description: English One Piece booster boxes cost +25% to +641% more than the same Japanese set right now. Full per-set price gap table (July 2026), liquidity and chase-card differences, and what OP-17's near-simultaneous release changes.
